privacyFirstDesc: WitnessWork yapangilwe pa kuti ubomba bwenu bwa bumboni busungwe inkama. Tapali account, takuli ukukonkesha, tapali data ifya kufuma pa cibombelo cenu ukwabula ukusuminisha.
privacyOfflineDesc: Conse icalemena cibomba pa cibombelo cenu. Takukabila Internet.
privacyOnDeviceTitle: Ifyenu Ifyebo Tafifuma pa Cibombelo Cenu
privacyOnDeviceDesc: Ishina lyenu, abakulanshanya, lipoti, ne fyebo fyenu fyaikala fye pa foni yenu. Tatutuma kuli ifwe nelyo ukusunga pa ma server yesu.
privacyShareInLinkDesc: Akanyenipo abakulanshanya ukupitila mu link sha mu nkama.
privacyYourDataDesc: Pelekenipo ukusunga konse inshita iyo mulefwaya. Mwakwata ifyenu ifyebo.
founderNoteBody:
Muli shani, niine Levi. Natampile ukupanga WitnessWork mu 2023 pa kupwisha amafya ayo nakwete nine umwine ilyo nale piyona. Icatampile fye nge cilangililo icapwe kunchitilwe nge cibombelo capalama capalama, capangilwe pa lwa ushiku ushingi no kushinguluka.

Calimoneka ukukoselesha ukumfwa kuli bamunyinefwe ne bankashi ukufuma mu calo conse abalemonako amaka. Insambililo yandi ya kuti ici cibombelo cikabombesha bwino kuli imwe pa myaka iingi iileisa.

No lutemwo lwa cibumba,
profileSetupTitle: Lekeni tupange WitnessWork ukulingana na imwe
profileSetupDesc: Ishina lya ku ntanshi fye — efyo fye twakabila. Conse ico mwalemba caikala fye pa cibombelo cenu.
pioneerStartDate_description: When did your current term as a regular pioneer begin? We'll show how long you've been serving.
pioneerStartDateTitle: When did you start regular pioneering?
specialPioneerStartDate_description: When did your current term as a special pioneer begin? We'll show how long you've been serving.
specialPioneerStartDateTitle: Mwatampa lilali ukupiyona kwa pa lwakwe?
circuitOverseerStartDate_description: When did your current term as a circuit overseer begin? Your tenure as a regular pioneer counts too — they share a clock. We'll show how long you've been serving.
circuitOverseerStartDateTitle: Mwatampa lilali ukwangalila uluse lwa kanenge?
regularAuxiliaryStartDate_description: When did your current term as a regular auxiliary pioneer begin? We'll show how long you've been serving.
regularAuxiliaryStartDateTitle: When did you start auxiliary pioneering?
profileIncompleteSubtitle: Lundeniko ishina lyenu pa kupwisha ukupanga
profileCardShader_description: Ilundako amalangi yacinjacinja pa profile card yenu ayasuka pa kutila inka.
shaderHolographic_description: Amalangi yacinjacinja ayatampuluka ilyo mwatila inka.
photoPermissionNeeded: WitnessWork ilekabila ukufika ku fikope fyenu pa kubika icikope ca profile. Kuti mwasuminisha mu Settings.
avatarSaveFailed: Tatwingashi icikope ico. Mukwai esheniko icimbi.
resetPhoto_description: Ibwesha icikope ca kabili kwati emo natu citampishishe. Icikope ca cine cisungwa.
removePhoto_description: Icikope ca uyu mukulanshanya cikafumiwapo. Kuti mwasala icipya inshita iyo mulefwaya.
originalUnavailable: Icikope ca cine tacaba — tulebomfya icikope cabuputuka nge ca cisinka. Saleni nakabili pa kubwesha bwema bwa cine.
photoLibraryWritePermissionNeeded: WitnessWork ilekabila insambu sha kusunga ifikope ku library yenu. Kuti mwasuminisha mu Settings.
neverForgetAReturnVisit_description: WitnessWork sizə gələcək qayıdış ziyarətləri və ya tədqiqatlar barədə xəbərdarlıq edəcək. Bunu sonradan tənzimləmələrdə dəyişə bilərsiniz.
notificationPreview_title: Ukubwekeshapo no kutandalila kuli Alex mu mineti 30
youreAllSet_description: WitnessWork sizə təyin etdiyiniz öyrətmə barədə xəbərdarlıq edəcək.
optInNotificationsLater: Sonradan tənzimləmələrdə bildirişləri aktiv edə bilərsiniz.
noContactsSaved: Heç bir kontakt saxlanılmadı. Kontakt əlavə etmək üçün plus düyməsinə toxunun.
deleteConversation_description: Bu söhbətin silinməsi onu və təyin olunmuş bildirişləri həmişəlik siləcək.
goalBasedOnPublisherType: Goal is based on your publisher type
editingOverride_description: You're editing a specific occurrence of this recurring plan. Changes will only apply to this date.
editingPlan_description: You're currently editing an existing plan. All fields below have been pre-filled with the current plan details.
deletedInstances_description: These recurring plan instances have been deleted. You can restore them if needed.
addTime_description: Entering time information below will log service time for that day
contactNotFoundForId: Contact not found for provided ID:
tapPlusToAddConvo: Tap the plus icon above to add a conversation.
name: Name
enterContactInformation: Enter the contact information below for the person you will be adding to WitnessWork.
youMustAssignAConversationToContact: You must assign a conversation to a contact.
reminderFifteenMinutes_part2: is in 15 mins. Prep up and get ready for a fruitful conversation!🚀📖
addConversation_description: Enter the conversation information below for the conversation you will be assigning to your contact.
note_placeholder: Write down information about your conversation. Be sure to be descriptive!
optionalNote: Optional note (e.g., details about the service day)
topic_placeholder: Enter topic, e.g., Enjoy Life Forever Ch. 1
notifyMe_notice: You will be notified 1 day before and 15 minutes before your desired time.
recoverContacts_description: Press undo below to recover a contact. Deleting contacts from this page will permanently delete it as well as corresponding conversations.
permanentlyDeleteContact_warning: Deleting this contact will permanently remove it and corresponding conversations.
deleteTime_description: Deleting this time report will permanently remove it.
pushNotificationsRequirePhysicalDevice: Mufwile ukubomfya icibombelo ica cine pa Push Notifications
notificationsDisabled: You'll need to enable push notification for WitnessWork
notificationsDisabled_description: Would you like us to take you to your phone settings?
update_description: Would you like to update now?
inactiveBibleStudiesDoNoCountTowardsMont: Bible studies won't contribute to monthly totals unless conducted at least once in the current month.
thereWasAnErrorWithYourUpdate: There was an error with your update.
loadingSlowly: This is taking longer than usual...
loadingSlowly_description: Try again later when connected to WIFI or when you have stable internet.
timeNeeded: Add hours or minutes above to submit your time entry.
archiveContact_description: Archiving this contact will delete it. You can recover it from the settings.
tapToAddAConversation: Tap here to add a conversation, or press the + button above.
pleaseDescribeYourIssue: Please describe your issue in detail
invalidPhone_description: is not a valid number for the region code:
appleAppStoreReviewErrorMessage: Please update your WitnessWork app to the latest version if available and try again.
internetNotAvailable: Internet not currently available. Please retry when connected to stable internet.
addNotAtHome_description: Enter any noteworthy information about not being able to reach this individual.
add_description: Add a 'Not at Home' or 'Conversation' to contact's history.
iWouldLikeToHelpTranslate: I would like to help translate WitnessWork! Please provide which languages you speak natively and what is your name. Thank you!
helpTranslate_message: WitnessWork is available in over 10+ languages by means of automatic translation tools. At times, these translations may not always be accurate. Would you like to help make them more accurate?
shareContactTrimmed: Fye {{included}} ifyalanshanya fya ku numa nomba (mu {{total}}) e fyalundilwe mu kuti link iikulile inono pa kwakanya.
shareContactTooLarge_description: This contact has too much data to fit in a shareable link. You can share it as a WitnessWork file instead, which the recipient can import into their app. They'll find Import Contact under Settings → More.
shareContactFileFailed_description: Something went wrong preparing the contact file. Please try again.
contactExists_description: A contact with this name already exists. Do you want to replace it with the imported data?
contactRecovered_description: This contact was previously deleted and has been automatically recovered. Do you want to replace it with the imported data?
invalidFile_description: The selected file is not a valid WitnessWork contact export.
bibleStudiesConducted: Number of different Bible studies conducted
contactNotFoundForProvidedId: Contact not found for provided ID.
couldNotFetchCoordinatesFromAddress: Could not fetch coordinates from address. If you want to view contact on map, you may want to try again later.
generateAUrlFromYourPreferredMappingServ: Share a link from different mapping services.
mapViewOnboarding2: existing contact that is missing coordinates.
mapViewOnboarding2_plural: existing contacts that are missing coordinates.
mapViewOnboarding3: You can choose to enable location services to view your current location on the map.
weDidOurBestToUpdateAllOfYourContacts: Likely most of your contacts updated, but they may not have. Try again later.
coordinatesAllowMapView: Coordinates allow you to view this contact on the map.
thisMayHelpYouLocateWhereYouAre: You will be able to view your location. The map will still function without sharing your location.
yourLocationIsNeverSharedToExternalServi: Your location is never shared to external services.
locationSharingDisabled: You'll need to enable location sharing for WitnessWork
markers_description: Your contacts will appear as markers.
pinsAreBasedOnYourMostRecentConversation: Pins are based on the time since your last visit. 'Not at homes' are considered visits.
map_emptyMissingLocationsBody: Contacts need an address or pin location before they can appear here. Review your saved contacts and add locations to the ones you want on the map.
map_emptyMissingLocationsTitle: Add locations to see your map
map_emptyNoContactsBody: Contacts with an address or pin location will appear here when you add them.
map_noSearchResults_description: No mapped contacts match this search.
thisWillBeConfigurableLater: In a future update, these time frames will be configurable.
pleaseDescribeYourFeatureClearly: Please describe what feature you'd like to have extremely detailed. Provide a contact name and phone. If applicable, please draw an image of what the feature might look like. Alternatively, send a screenshot of an app that has similar functionality.
couldNotOpenMaps_description: Please verify you have a valid mapping application installed.
youCanChangeThisLaterInTheSettings: You can change this later in the settings.
preferredMaps_description: WitnessWork will use your preferred mapping application to navigate to your contact's address.
nextVisitOffset_description: How far out your next visit should be from when you create a conversation.
notificationOffset_description: How much time before your next visit when the notification arrives.
plan_notification_part1: Ipulani yenu ya mulimo yatampa mu
planNotificationOffset_description: Inshita inga pa ntanshi ya kutampa kwa pulani yenu ipo notification ikesa.
milestoneReveal_tagline: Our biggest update yet — packed with the features you asked for.
milestoneShowcase_closingBody:
I poured a year of late nights into this update. I hope it serves you well in the ministry.

With brotherly love,
milestoneHero_liquidGlass_description: A whole new design with a floating tab bar, frosted cards, and subtle materials that catch the light. The app finally feels right at home on your phone.
milestoneHero_progress_description: A fresh look at Month, Year, and All-time, with custom milestones, category breakdowns, lifetime hours, and fireworks the moment you cross a goal.
milestoneHero_contacts_description: A dedicated Contacts tab with fuzzy search, smart sort, stacked filters, and inline avatars. Find anyone in two taps.
milestoneHero_iCloudSync_description: Your reports, contacts, and plans sync seamlessly across all your devices through iCloud. Optional photo sync keeps avatars in step too. Supporter feature.
milestoneHero_widgets_description: Your monthly calendar, hours, and upcoming appointments right on your home screen. Tap any widget to jump straight where you need to go.
milestoneSecondary_onboardingFounder_des: Onboarding rebuilt from the ground up, with a personal note from the developer and a checklist tailored to your goals.
milestoneSecondary_fireworks_description: Beautiful celebrations the moment you cross a milestone or annual goal.
milestoneSecondary_avatars_description: Add a photo or emoji avatar to every contact, with a tap-to-expand fullscreen viewer.
milestoneSecondary_sharing_description: Hand off a contact to another publisher with a secure universal link.
milestoneSecondary_missedConversations_d: A gentle home-screen nudge for follow-ups that slipped past — dismiss them once you've reached out.
milestoneSecondary_followUpRework_descri: A clearer reschedule sheet with quick-date chips, a log-visit shortcut, and tappable contact previews.
milestoneSecondary_recurring_description: Schedule by day-of-week and week-of-month, with overrides and deletions.
milestoneSecondary_rollover_description: Fractional minutes carry forward into the next month, manually or automatically.
milestoneSecondary_supporter_description: A little thank-you for those already supporting the app — exclusive perks like a custom accent color.
milestoneSecondary_appIcon_description: Supporters can swap the home screen app icon for one of several alternates.
milestoneSecondary_schedule_description: A focused calendar view of your day plans and recurring conversations.
milestoneSecondary_shaders_description: Your ministry life at a glance: name, role, time served, and fun stats that make you smile.
milestoneSecondary_mapEmpty_description: A friendlier empty state and refined location prompts on first use.

160.c1: Conversations are now editable. Notifications are configurable
160.c2: Swipe gestures to edit or delete conversations, contacts, etc.
160.c3: Added haptic feedback to various important actions

161.c1: Added more minute options for time entries

162.c1: Adjusted special pioneer hour requirement from 70 to 100

181.c2: Added store review request after certain criteria is met

182.c1: Updated all time to reflect the current locale

190.c2: [iOS] Select between Google, Apple, and Waze as your default navigation app in preferences.
190.c3: Now configure default values for your follow up and notification times in preferences.
190.c5: New progress bar organizes your time entries by category
190.c6: Now add custom tags to your time entries
190.c7: Updated Time Reports screen to be better organized and separated by month

191.c1: Resolves an issue navigating to time screens.

192.c1: Now tap on a conversation row to edit, or swipe left as before.
192.c2: Fixes an issue where some devices have an overflowing progress bar.
192.c3: Adds more verbose handling of link errors for certain devices lacking required applications.
192.c4: Navigate directly to a month from the monthly routine section of the home screen.
192.c5: Time Reports screen better handles empty and future months.

1100.c1: Adds annual report to Time Reports screen! Keep track of your service year progress at a glance.
1100.c2: Adding time from Time Reports screen now defaults the report to the selected month.
1100.c3: Fixes an issue exporting January service report.

1110.c1: Adds native support for iPad & tablets!
1110.c2: Adjusted various styles to better fit larger screens.
1110.c3: Adjusted the method of submitting Bug Reports and Feature Requests to Github.

1111.c1: Add donate page in the settings for those who wish to contribute.
1111.c2: Includes various minor improvements and bug fixes

1120.c1: Adds backup and restore functionality. Now you can backup your data to the cloud and restore it later. You can transfer your data to another device. You can also transfer it to another platform. Find this new feature in the settings.

1200.c1: Adds backup and restore functionality. Now you can backup your data to the cloud and restore it later, this allows you to transfer your data to another device. You can also transfer it to another platform. Find this new feature in settings.

1201.c1: Updates monthly routine section of home screen to show surrounding months.
1201.c2: Significantly improved Korean translations - thank you brother Paul. If you'd like to help translate your own language, please visit the settings.

1210.c1: Greatly improved accuracy of time displays.
1210.c2: Improved accuracy of time progress bars.
1210.c3: Added helpful hints for actions that may not be immediately noticeable.
1210.c4: Improved quality of life on the maps screen with more relevant information and a quick-add button.

1211.c1: Added more helpful one-time hints when appropriate.

1220.c3: Added Calendar to time reports screen.
1220.c1: Preferences are now better organized by category.
1220.c2: Improved import & export screen to be visually clearer.
1220.c4: Occasionally notifies you to create a new backup. This is configurable in the settings.

1221.c1: [iOS] Date and Time pickers now use the correct locale
1221.c2: Fixed an issue where editing a conversation would incorrectly navigate.
1221.c3: Other minor bug fixes and performance improvements.
1221.c4: Improved Spanish translation - thank you brother Cleen. If you'd like to help translate your own language, see 'Help Translate' in the settings.

1230.c1: Added new Annual Overview screen to view your service year progress by month.
1230.c2: Added 'Today' button to quickly navigate back to current month when viewing previous months or years.
1230.c3: Updated Special Pioneers to not have an annual goal by default.
1230.c4: Added 'Annual Goal' setting to publisher preferences. This allows you to override the default setting for your publisher type.
1230.c5: Greatly improved Italian translations, thank you brother Giuseppe!

1240.c1: Added ability to manually adjust contact pin location on all map views. Simply touch, hold, and drag the pin.
1240.c2: Added small map view to contact details screen and resolved errors for invalid coordinates.
1240.c3: Resolved an overflow visual issue that sometimes occurs on small screens when viewing map contact cards.

1250.c1: Big update! Added scheduling & plans! 🚀 You can now create one-time plans, recurring plans, and view your month's schedule.
1250.c2: Improved clarity by adding 'toast' notifications for notable app actions.
1250.c3: Updated various sections of time reports screen to have more information and easier navigation.
1250.c4: Resolved minor visual issues and other bugs.
1250.c5: Added font size offset setting to preferences. This allows you to adjust the font size of the app.

1260.c1: Fixed issue where scroll position would be lost on TimeReportsScreen. Resolved other issues related to time reports screen.
1260.c2: LDC hours do not contribute more towards annual goal past 55 hours for any given month.
1260.c3: Recurring plans can be deleted by single event or single event and all future events.
1260.c4: New custom fields for contacts! You can create any number of custom fields you wish.
1260.c5: You can now share your time directly with NW Publisher!

1270.c1: Added Timer! ⏱️ (Stopwatch). You can now start and stop a timer to track your time directly within the app.
1270.c2: Resolved crashing issue for some devices when navigating to the Contact Details screen.
1270.c4: Other minor bug fixes and improvements.

1280.c3: Update dependencies and add security updates.
1280.c2: Updated Portuguese translations, thank you brother Sérgio!
1280.c4: 📝 A little personal note: I have been very busy with congregation responsibilities and life recently. After my upcoming convention next week, things will return more back to normal. I will be working on many more updates in the coming weeks! Thank you for your patience and for choosing WitnessWork! ❤️

1290.c1: Added new schedule section to month summary screen which helps you keep track of your time pacing.
1290.c2: On home screen, resolved overlapping issues that sometimes happen on small screen sizes.
1290.c3: You can now edit time entries! Tap on them!
1290.c4: Many improvements have been made to clarity of how to add, update, and delete various items across WitnessWork. Hints have been removed as they're no longer necessary.
1290.c5: I'm looking for 2 volunteers who have experience in Software QA to assist in testing releases before they reach the public. If you have interest in spending a few hours a month testing, your support would be greatly appreciated. Please contact me: levi@leviwilkerson.com. In the future and as expenses allows, a portion of donations will go to QA for their time.
1290.c6: Annual time overview screen now is compressed for better readability.

1291.c1: [ANDROID] Resolved crashes that occurred when editing time.

1300.c1: Add 'Annual Schedule' to Plan Schedule screen for those with an annual goal, allowing you to easily see if you have planned enough time for your entire service year.
1300.c2: Hides 'today' schedule view when the month is in the future because it's not applicable.
1300.c4: If a contact pin was dragged for a contact, navigation will now prioritize the manually adjusted pin over their address. Editing a contact's address will return the address to priority.
1300.c7: Contact pin colors on Contact Details Screen now matches the map screen.
1300.c9: Month and annual total calculations now properly limit your credit time to 55 hours per month. Standard time is not affected by this rule. If you exceed this time using credit, you'll have overage displayed on your month's details screen.
1300.c10: Added time credit support. Existing users will be able to update their old time entries automatically.
1300.c11: Resolved issue with add button overlapping compass on iOS.

1310.c1: Greatly improved performance when navigating to time related screens.
1310.c3: Resolve date localization issue that occurred in some regions.
1310.c4: Updated styles and locations of commonly used items. Month and Service Year reports can be easily accessed in the tab bar at the bottom of the screen.
1310.c5: Resolved style overflow issues that occurred on certain screen sizes for the map screen.
1310.c6: Now automatically prefills recently used addresses when creating multiple contacts on the same day.
1310.c7: You can now toggle visibility of the home screen sections. Visit Preferences > Home Screen.
1310.c8: The app now is named WitnessWork, formerly 'JW Time' due to legal reasons.
1310.c9: Ifitundu nomba fileesha ukusanga incende yenu iya cine cine, nga tefyo kuti fyabwelela ku ncende iili yonse ne citundu cenu. Nga ca kuti tapali icasangwa, cilafuma mu ciNgeleshi.
1310.c10: Ululimi lwa Bemba lwalundwako! Tulekabila ukwafwilisha kwenu pa kuti tupilibule. Mukwai kabiyeni ku Fibikilo > Kwafwilisha Ukupilibula

1320.c1: Nomba pangani fye abakulanshanya. Nga ca kuti icifulo cenu ca mu mishi nga nshi nelyo cakwata amashiwi yabipa aya kupanga amapu, nomba takuli ukukabila ukushintilila pa keyala.
1320.c2: Mwayanguka ukupilibula pakati ka cibombelo, icafiita, na icabuuta. Ukutandalila Ifyo Mulefwaya > Imimonekele.
1320.c4: 'Ukulundako Inshita' icikope nomba cilasuminisha ukulundako kwa mineti imo.
1320.c5: Ululundwako Ululimi lwa Kinyarwanda, ulwapilibulwa fyonse na Semana D. Natasha sana pa kwafwilisha kwenu!
1320.c6: Nomba kuti mwasala ifyo inshita yenu ikalangishiwa. Salenipo pakati ka fishinka ikumi nga: 13.5 nangu salenipo Ama-awala 13 na Amaminiti 30. Ukutandalila Ifyo Mulefwaya > Imimonekele.

1330.c1: Icakusalapo ululimi icalundwako. Moneni Ifyo mwatemwa pakuti mulungike ululimi lwenu.
1330.c2: Ubwafya bwapwishishiwe ne pulani ya nshita imo iyakwata ubushiku ubushalungama.
1330.c3: Ukupwisha ubwafya bwa kufumyapo ifiputulwa fya nshita.

1340.c1: Ukulundapo icilambu ca pa lwakwe ilyo mwafumyapo akabokoshi kenu aka nshita nelyo ukulundako inshita!
1340.c2: Kuti nomba wabika umutengo wa cikumi pa fishinte fya maawala pa 'ifyalinga' umusango wa kasabankanya.

1350.c1: Nomba kuti wabomfya ukupwisha ukwaibeela pakufwaya akeyala! Tampa fye ukutaipa pakuti umone ifyakupanda amano. Ici cintu kuti cacitika fye pa mulandu wa fya kusangwilako fyenu ifya kuitemenwa. Twatasha pa kwafwilisha kwenu!
1350.c2: Ubwafya bwapwishiwe apo ibuula lya bushiku talyaisala ilyo mwalundako inshita ku bushiku bwa mweshi.
1350.c3: Ubwafya bwa kupongomoka bwapwishiwe pa cibuno ca pa ng'anda ica ma tablet.

1360.c1: New: Share Contacts and easily import them. Transfering calls is now easier than ever.
1360.c2: Added a color key to the map view! You can now customize the colors of the pins on the map.
1360.c3: NEW: Dismiss Contact feature - You can now dismiss contacts you no longer wish to visit and receive notifications when it's time to return to them.
1360.c4: Added notes support to time reports - You can now add notes to your daily time entries to keep track of important details.
1360.c5: Improves visibility of Map on Contacts Details screen.
1360.c7: Added statistics sections to your Monthly and Yearly reports to better track your progress and patterns.
1360.c8: You can now change your calendar's first day of the week. Visit Preferences > Appearance.
1360.c9: Improved progress bar animations throughout the app and added additional encouragement messages.
1360.c10: Enhanced follow up topic input - Now supports multiple lines for easier writing of longer topics.
1360.c11: There are now no restrictions on when you can add or schedule time, in the future or past.
1360.c12: Added visual indicators on calendar days to show when notes are present.
1360.c13: Resolves issue with Korean and Panama phone number formatting.
1360.c14: Improves visibility of Map on Contacts Details screen with better zoom levels.
1360.c15: Fixed various navigation issues when adding time and scheduling plans.
1360.c16: Improved readability and consistency throughout the app with better spacing and button sizes.

1382.c1: The Milestone Update is here. A whole new look with a floating tab bar, frosted cards, and a fresh, modern feel throughout the app.
1382.c2: New Contacts tab with fuzzy search, smart sort, and stacked filters. Your contacts are now a first-class destination.
1382.c3: Progress Screen 2.0: a fresh look at Month, Year, and All-time, with customizable milestones, category breakdowns, and lifetime hours.
1382.c4: iCloud sync arrives (Supporter): your reports, contacts, and plans stay in step across all your devices. Optional photo sync keeps avatars synced too.
1382.c5: Onboarding has been rebuilt from the ground up. A personal note from the developer, animated plan previews, and a checklist tailored to your goals.
1382.c6: Brand new home screen widgets: month calendar, appointments, hours, and contacts. All one tap away.
1382.c7: Contact avatars are here. Photos or emoji, with a tap-to-expand fullscreen viewer.
1382.c8: Share a contact with another publisher via secure universal links.
1382.c9: Smarter recurring plans. Schedule by day-of-week and week-of-month, with per-instance overrides and deletions.
1382.c10: Time rollover: fractional minutes carry forward into the next month, manually or automatically.
1382.c11: Beautiful new celebrations the moment you cross a goal.
1382.c12: New Supporter tier with personalization, including a custom accent color.
1382.c13: Schedule screen: a focused calendar view of day plans and recurring conversations.
1382.c14: A redesigned profile card on the home screen showing your role, time served, and fun stats.
1382.c15: Approaching and missed conversations now surface on the home screen so you never lose track.
1382.c16: Phone region code now persists across new contacts. Phone region search is faster and more accurate.
1382.c17: Map empty state, location prompts, and contact map clustering have all been polished.
1382.c18: Countless small bug fixes, performance improvements, and visual refinements throughout the app.

categoryNeeded: You must select an existing category or add a custom category.
theHoursBelowAreAlreadyIncludedInMyTotal: The categories below are already included in my total hours.
otherHoursDescription: Below is already included in total
failedToOpenLink_description: Please verify you have a valid application for the provided link. This error typically means you do not have a browser installed on your device.
noTimeReports_description: Add at least one time entry for this month to view details.
cannotNavigateToFutureMonth_description: Select the current or previous month.
addATimeEntryToViewReport: Add a time entry to view your monthly report.
hoursPerMonthToGoal: hours per month to annual goal
donate_warning: You do not receiving any goods or services in exchange for donating.
couldNotFindOffer: Could Not Find offer. Please try again later.
thereAreNoOfferings: There are no donation methods available at this time. Please check again later.
thankYou_description: I am undeserving of such kindness. Your generosity is greatly appreciated.
thankYou_benefitsIntro: Mone ifyo ukutu afwilisha kwenu kwa cingula nge ica kutasha.
thankYou_oneTimeDescription: Ukupeela kwenu kwa lwakwe kwatashilwe sana kabili kwafwilisha ukutwalilila WitnessWork.
monthlySupporterExplainer: Monthly supporters bapokelela Supporter badge ne fya kuingisha fyonse pesamba. One-time donations baletashwa nakabili, lelo tabapeela Supporter status iya kuntanshi.
oneTimeNoSupporterNote: One-time — icapeelwa ne mutima onse, lelo tacipeela Supporter status iya kuntanshi.
monthlySupporterNote: Monthly — ifungula Supporter badge ne fyonse ifya kuingisha.
failedToOpenMailApplication_description: Please verify you have a valid mail application installed.
supporterNudge_body: The app is, and always will be, free. If WitnessWork has been helpful to you in your ministry, supporters help keep it going.
errorCheckingOut: There was an error when checking out. It likely is due to network instability, please try again.
goToAppStoreToUpdateSubscriptions: To cancel or edit your subscription, please visit the App Store.
importAndExport_description: Import and export your data to and from WitnessWork. This is useful if you are switching devices or want to backup your data.
importError_description: There was an error importing your file. Please verify that your file is valid and try again.
importErrorInvalidFile_description: The file you are trying to import is invalid. Please use the exported file from WitnessWork and try again.
backupRecommendations:
It is recommended to store your backup in cloud storage. This will ensure you do not lose your data in the event you lose or break your device.

This feature also works when transferring to a new device.
backupReasoning: Because your data will never be stored on servers, the app will never have a 'sync' functionality. Instead, you must manually import and export your data. This is a security feature to ensure your data is never compromised.
sharingIsNotAvailable: Sharing is not available on this platform.
errorExporting_description: There was an error exporting your data. Please ensure your device has enough storage and that sharing is available, then try again.
map_noContactsWithGeocodes: You do not have any contacts with coordinates yet. Try to add a contact or update your existing contacts to include a coordinate.
didYouKnow_longPressCopy_body: Touch and hold a contact's phone number, email, or address to copy it instantly to your clipboard.
didYouKnow_swipeEditConvo_body: Swipe a conversation row from the left to jump straight into editing — no need to open the full form.
didYouKnow_dragMapPin_body: On the map, tap and drag a contact's marker to a more accurate spot. The location updates automatically.
didYouKnow_longPressMap_body: When editing a contact's location, long-press the map to set their exact spot, then fine-tune by dragging.
didYouKnow_notAtHome_body: Mark a conversation as not-at-home and it'll resurface later in your missed-conversation reminders.
didYouKnow_accentColor_body: Supporters can switch the accent color from green to one of nine curated palettes in Preferences → Personalization.
didYouKnow_fontSizeOffset_body: Adjust the global text size without touching system settings — Preferences → Appearance → Font Size.
didYouKnow_hideHomeSections_body: Hide the sections you don't use in Preferences → Home Screen. Keep only what matters to you.
didYouKnow_followUpOffset_body: Choose how far ahead return visits surface and when you're notified, down to the minute. Preferences → Conversations.
didYouKnow_planNotifications_body: Set how long before a scheduled plan you want to be notified — independent from follow-up reminders.
didYouKnow_backupCadence_body: Get nudged to back up your data anywhere from every 1 to every 365 days. Preferences → Backups.
didYouKnow_widgetSort_title: Sort the contacts widget your way
didYouKnow_widgetSort_body: Choose longest-since-contacted, recent conversation, alphabetical, or Bible study. Preferences → Widgets.
didYouKnow_swipeDeleteTime_body: Swipe a time entry from the right to remove it. Rollover pairs are detected so partial minutes don't get stranded.
howToDeleteTime: Delete a time entry by swiping on it from the right, try it!
howToArchiveContact: Archive old contacts by swiping on it from the right. Archived contacts can be restored later from the settings.
howToEditAndDeleteConversation:
Edit a conversation by tapping on it or swipe on it from the left.

To delete, swipe on it from the right.
detailedProgressBar_description: Updates the home screen progress bar and breaks down your time entries by category. It also shows your time as decimal so it is more accurate.
viewTimeReportsForThisDate: View all reports for this day. Swipe on a report to delete it.
noReportsThisDay: No time reports for this day yet.
daysSinceLastBackup_description: WitnessWork will notify you after this many days since your last backup to create a new backup of your data.
recommendedBackup_description: It has been over {{count}} days since your last backup. It is recommended to create a new backup now.
thisGloballyOffsetsTextSize: It is recommended to change your device's text size if you are having trouble reading the app. This setting will affect the entire apps's font size.
oneTimeSchedule_description: One time plans will override any recurring schedules.
timePlanned_description: The percentage of your time planned for the month relative to your publisher type's goal. Try to plan for at least 100% of your goal.
complete_description: If you meet your planned time for a day, it is marked as complete.
projectedHoursDescription: Combines hours you've already logged with hours you have planned. Aim to reach 100% of your goal.
calendarPublisherLocked: Calendar yaba kuli ba pioneers ne mibomba imbi iyakwata icalimo cikulu.
deletePlan_description: Deleting this plan will permanently remove it.
existingPlansForDay_description: You already have these plans for this day. Swipe to delete them.
viewAllReportAndPlansForDate: View all reports and plans for this day. Swipe to delete an item. Day plans always override any recurring plans.
youCannotCreateAPlanForAPreviousDay: You cannot create a plan for a previous date.
nwPublisherOnlyAllowsLastMonth: NW Publisher only allows you to submit the previous month's report.
deleteField_description: Are you sure you want to delete this custom field?
manageCustomFields_description: Pyangulukenipo, mishengenipo, nelyo sungenipo umusangwa wenu. Ukupyangukamo umusangwa kuilundamo ku fyonse — data ya mukulanshanya tayalufiwa.
archiveField_description: Ukusunga "{{label}}" kufisa uyu musangwa ku bakulanshanya lelo kuleka inomba sha mukulanshanya onse ifyaikala. Kuti mwabwesha ukufuma ku manage screen inshita iyo mulefwaya.
archivedFields_description: Imisangwa iyasungwa yafiswa konse. Bweseni umusangwa pa kubwesha pa contact form ne nomba shonse ifyalimo.
resetTimer_description: You will lose your current time entry if you reset the timer. Do you want to reset?
notEnoughTime_description: Not enough time has elapsed. You must have at least 5 minutes to submit a time entry.
providedTimeIsLessThanFiveMinutes: Provided time is less than 5 minutes.
tryToPlanAtLeast100Percent: Try to plan at least 100% of your goal.
updateTime_description: Edit or delete a previous service report
thisContactHasNoConversations: This contact has no conversations yet.
youHaveCreditOverage: You have credit overage in the amount of {{value}}
credit_description: Credit will be counted towards the month if your standard time plus credit doesn't exceed 55 hours.
creditOverCapReasonNoneApplied: Reason: non-credit hours already meet or exceed your credit cap.
creditOverCapReasonPartialApplied: Only credit within your cap is counted in the Credit line.
creditOverageInTheAmountOf: Credit overage in the amount of {{count}} hours.
overrideCreditLimit_description: By default, credit hours are limited to 55 hours total when combined with standard time. Special pioneers and circuit overseers have no limit by default.
customCreditLimitHours_description: Set your own credit limit in hours. Enter 0 for no limit.
witnessWorkNowSupportsCredits: WitnessWork now properly supports credits for those with an annual service goal. Once your update an existing tag, all of your service reports will update as well.
noReportsForThisYear: There are no service entries for {{count}}.
lookingForViewHours_description: If you're a standard publisher, but you want to record your hours for personal reasons - change your publisher status to 'Custom'. Then, the month tab will become available to you from the home screen.
dontWantGoal_description: Set your hour requirement to 0. This will allow you to record your time, like pioneers, without a goal.
timePlanned_description2: Your goal is determined by your publisher type. Try to plan for at least 100% of your goal.
prefilledFromLastContact_short: From your last contact — edit to add a neighbor.
autoFillAddressFromLastContact_descripti: When adding multiple contacts on the same street, the address from your previous contact is reused so you only need to change the house number. Resets each day.
sectionsVisibility_description: Toggle visibility on sections of the home screen to reduce clutter.
approachingConversations_description: This section appears only when you have a follow-up conversation scheduled later in the same day.
locationDisabled_description: Ukwakana kwa ncende yenu kwaleshiwa. Mapu tekuti ilenge incende yenu ukupalamika.
overrideCoordinate_description: Mwalondolwele uko mulefwaya. Apo mwacinja fye akeyala, bushe mulefwaya ukubwesha fye akeyala akapya ukulingana na akeyala akapya?
pinLocation_description: Pini ikapangwa ukulingana ne keyala mwalemba. Nga mulefwaya, kuti mwalundako icifulo ca pin icalinga pesamba.
pinOnMap_descriptionAuto: Derived from the address above. Tap to set a custom pin.
providedTimeIsLessThanOneMinute: Inshita yapeelwa tayacilile pali mineti imo.
pinLocationHelp: Tinikeni inshita itali pali mapu nangula tinikeni 'Lundapo' ukupanga. Ukukuma & ukusenda pa kuti uleenda.
tapDayToSchedule_description: Tampa ukupanga nangu ukwalula ubupekanyo bwa nshita imo nangu ubwabwekeshiwapo ukupitila mu kusala ubushiku ubuli pesamba.
languageFoundButIsFallbackLocale: Umulimo wa bumboni ulatungilila ululimi lwenu. Icifulo cenu ica cine cine, {{original}}, tacisuminishiwe kanshi cabwelele kuli {{fallback}}.
languageWasNotFound: Umulimo wa Nte tausuminisha ululimi lwa cibombelo cenu, {{original}}. Cabwelele ku numa ku ca iko' ululimi lwa lyonse.
errorFetchingAddress: Ubwafya mukufwaya akeyala. Mukwai esheniko nakabili panuma.
locationOff_openSettings: Location off — tap to open Settings
noPlansScheduledForThisMonth: No plans scheduled for this month.
scheduledPlans_description: Tap any plan to edit or view details. Swipe to delete.
dismissContactDescription: This will hide {{name}} from your contact list and map for {{duration}}. {{example}}
dismissContactDescriptionWithNotificatio:
This will hide {{name}} from your contact list and map for {{duration}}. {{example}}

You'll receive a notification when {{name}} becomes available again.
dismissContactHelp: {{name}} will be hidden from your contact list and map for the time period you choose. You can always find dismissed contacts in Settings > Contacts > Dismissed Contacts.
contactDismissedWithNotificationMessage: {{name}} is dismissed until {{until}}. You'll receive a notification when they're available again.
contactAvailableAgainMessage: {{name}} is now available in your contacts again! {{emoji}}
noDismissedContacts: No dismissed contacts. Use "Dismiss For Later" on any contact to hide them temporarily.
dismissedContactsHelp: These contacts are temporarily hidden from your main contact list and map. They will automatically reappear when their dismiss period expires.
undismissContactDescription: This contact will immediately reappear in your contact list and map.
bestMonthLastYear: Umweshi uwacingili sana mu mwaka uwapwile
categoryBreakdown_description: Ifyo ama-awala yenu yapanwa pa makatekoli ya mulimo uno mweshi.
aboutCreditCap_description: Credit cap yenu ipakanya inshita ya credit iyo italwa ku icalandwilwe ca mweshi. Ama-awala yalembwa pakana cap yalondololwa lelo tayanake ama-awala mwakabila ukufika ku calandwilwe.
highlightGoalTitle: Saneni icili cili awala ku icalandwilwe cenu
highlightGoalDesc: Stopwatch, ukulundako tags, ne lipoti — fyaipangwa pa ifyo mulefwa.
highlightCheckTitle: Saneni inshita yenu mu kutinika kumo
highlightCheckDesc: Akabokoshi ka pa mweshi — takuli ukuloleshapo akashita inshita.
highlightConversationsDesc: Sungeni ukubwekeshapo konse no kuyatampila apo mwapwilile.
highlightReportDesc: Ama-awala, ifyalanshanya, ne ifyakula muli lipoti imo iyalondololwa.
highlightRemindersTitle: Akashiwi pa ntanshi ya kutandalila konse
widgetsDescription: Pangeni ifyo widget sha home screen shimoneka no kubomba.
rescheduleDescription: Sendeni follow-up iyi ku bushiku bupya.
alreadyHadVisitDescription: Lembeni ukulanshanya uko mwakwete na uyu mukulanshanya.
addConversationShortDescription: Lembeni ukutandalila kupya na uyu mukulanshanya.
dismissFollowUpConfirmDesc: Ici cifumyapo follow-up reminder ukwabula ukulemba ukulanshanya kupya. Ukulanshanya kwa cine kuilala kwati emo.
supporterOnboardingDesc: WitnessWork yali, kabili lyonse ikabako, ya bweka. Nga ya cintile, kuti mwasankamuko ukuafwilisha kupanga — no kupokelela imibomwele imbi iya kupanga app yenu yobe yobe.
supporterOnboardingLeadIn: Muli shani, niine Levi! Mpanga WitnessWork ngo mulimo wa lutemwo, mu nshita yandi iya kupopola, ku bumboni. App ya bweka, kabili ikatwalilila ukuba ya bweka. Nga ya cintile kuli imwe, ukuba supporter kuli mu kutasha kabili kupeela ifyalimo ifya pa lwakwe nge ca kupimika.
supporterOnboardingPersonalPublisher: Nga kasabankanya, WitnessWork yaikala ukufuma mu nshila yenu kabili yebukisha ifyebo pali imwe.
supporterOnboardingPersonalRegularAuxili: Nga Regular Auxiliary Pioneer, WitnessWork ikaba na imwe pa awala iliyonse mu yenu 30 mu uno mweshi.
supporterOnboardingPersonalRegularPionee: Nga Regular Pioneer, WitnessWork ikaba na imwe pa awala iliyonse mu yenu 50 mu uno mweshi.
supporterOnboardingPersonalCircuitOverse: Nga Circuit Overseer, WitnessWork ikamutungilila pa kwendelesha ifintu fingi.
supporterOnboardingPersonalSpecialPionee: Nga Special Pioneer, WitnessWork ikaba na imwe pa awala lyonse iyo mwafwaisha.
supporterOnboardingPersonalCustom: Conse cifwaya icalandwilwe cenu, WitnessWork yaipangwa pa kufika ku mwaba.
supporterOnboardingIntentsLine: Ukwafwilisha ukufikilisha {{count}} ifya bumi imwe mwasala.
supporterOnboardingFindLater: Tapali ukuwambuka — kuti mwakaisula ici inshita iyo mulefwaya ukufuma pa heart pa Home screen, nelyo pesamba ya Settings → Support.
supporterHeroDesc: Sungeni abakulanshanya benu, lipoti, ifyebo, ifyo mwatemwa, ne fikope (nga mulefwaya), ifya kulingana pa fibombelo fyenu fyonse.
supporterPerkAccentDesc: Saleni icilangi cilingana ne misango yenu — app icinjacinja konse.
supporterPerkAppIconDesc: Swap your Home Screen icon — gold, dark, minimalist, or one that follows the seasons.
supporterPerkMoreDesc: Ukucinjacinja kwa pa lwakwe ne fimbi ifya bweno-bweno fileisa pa nshita.
appIconScreenDescription: Pick a Home Screen icon. Seasonal rotates through four looks based on the time of year and your region.
appIconUnsupported: This device doesn't support changing the app icon.
appIconChangeFailed: Couldn't change the app icon. Try again in a moment.
appIconArtistCallDescription: Hey, I'd love to team up with an artist or graphic designer to create fun and unique app icon variants. This is a small indie project, so I can't offer a huge budget — but I'm glad to put together a modest payment plus a free lifetime Supporter membership as a thank-you. If that sounds like a fun fit, please reach out at
supporterAlwaysFreeNote: Cilolwa cili cili ca bweka. Ukuafwilisha kwa kulondolokela kabili kwafwilisha ukutwalilila ukupanga.
supporterSheetSubtitle: Ukuafwilisha kwenu kwafwilisha ukulama WitnessWork no kufungula ifyalimo fimo fimo ifya pa lwakwe.
supporterGateSheetSubtitle: Supporters bafwilisha ukulondolola ukupanga no kupokelela inshila imbi sha kupanga app yenu yobe yobe.
paywallLetterBody: Muli shani, niine Levi. Mpanga WitnessWork mu nshita yandi iya kupopola pantu ndatemwa ukwafwilisha bamunyinefwe ne bankashi mu mulimo wa bumboni. Nga yacintile kuli imwe, ukwafwilisha kufunda imipashi iyalingile pa kuilama ku kutwalilila, kabili kufungula fimo fimo nge ca kutasha.
paywallSupporterTabDesc: Lipila pa cilolelwa cilingana. Cili cili pesamba cifungula Supporter.
paywallTipTabDesc: Akatasha ka inshita imo. Twatasha sana — lelo takapeela Supporter status.
accentColorHelp: Saleni icilangi cipyana mu cibuluu cili pakati pa app.
avatarBackgroundColorHelp: Pa kutampa, inuma ya avatar ikonkana ne accent color yenu. Saleni icilangi cimbi ukucincinja fye avatar.
contactHeroBackgroundColorHelp: Tint the top of this contact's details screen. Independent of the avatar color.
profileEditDesc: Lundeniko ishina lyenu nelyo avatar inshita iyo mulefwaya. Conse caikala pa cibombelo cenu.
iCloudSync_description: Sungeni abakulanshanya, ifyalanshanya, lipoti, na ifyo mwatemwa fyenu mu kulingana pa iPhone na iPad yenu mu kubomfya iCloud. Data yaikala muli container yenu iya kwakanya — tatuyimona.
iCloudBetaNotice: iCloud Sync is in beta. It should be reliable for everyday use, but you may occasionally run into rough edges — please report anything unexpected.
iCloudSyncDisabled_description: Bilisheni iCloud sync pa kuti abakulanshanya, ifyalanshanya, ne lipoti fyenu fyaikalile mu kulingana pa fibombelo fyenu fyonse.
iCloudResetConfirm_description: Ici cifumyapo ifyabikwa muli iCloud. Data ya pa cibombelo cenu yashala — ikabwekeshwapo pa sync iikonkapo.
iCloudUnavailable_description: Iseni Settings → [Ishina Lyenu] → iCloud → iCloud Drive kabili bilisheni, kabili eshenipo nakabili.
iCloudOpenSettingsHelp: Iseni Settings → [Ishina Lyenu] → iCloud → iCloud Drive kabili bilisheni.
iCloudPrivacyNote: Data isungwa muli container ya iCloud iya kwakanya iya app yenu. Apple yendelesha ukutuma no kucinkonkesha; Advanced Data Protection ifungula ukucinkonkesha kwa kushikulu nga yabilishiwa muli iOS Settings.
iCloudFirstEnableDescription: Ici cibombelo na iCloud bonse balikwete data. Saleni ifyo twingatampa — kuti mwacinja inshita iyo mulefwaya.
iCloudChoiceKeepLocalTitle: Sungeni data ya pa ici cibombelo
iCloudChoiceKeepLocalDesc: Pyana iCloud backup ne ifyo fili pa ici cibombelo. Calinga nga ici e cibombelo mwabomfya sana.
iCloudChoiceUseRemoteDesc: Pyana data ya pa ici cibombelo ne ifyo fili muli iCloud. Bomfyeni ici nga data yenu iya cine yali pa iPhone nelyo iPad imbi.
iCloudChoiceMergeDesc: Yatambeni bonse — version iyalulwa ku numa nomba pa cintu cili cili e ipingula. Tayatuminwa nga bumbi bwakwete data ya kupocola ukufuma ku app ipya.
iCloudReplaceLocalConfirm_title: Pyana data ya pa ici cibombelo?
iCloudReplaceLocalConfirm_description: Abakulanshanya, ifyalanshanya, lipoti, ne fyo mwatemwa pa ici cibombelo fikapyaniwa ne iCloud backup. Ici tacingabwesha.
iCloudImagesToggleSubtitle: Tumeni ifikope fya profile ne fya bakulanshanya. Ifya cine fyasungwa; fyalwila pa iCloud storage.
iCloudImagesInfoFooter: Ifikope fyasungwa pa iCloud Drive yenu kabili fyakonka conse ico mwakwete pa Apple ID yenu. Bilisheni Advanced Data Protection ku kucinkonkesha kwa kushikulu.
iCloudImagesEnableConfirm_description:
Icikope cenu ca profile ne fikope fya bakulanshanya ifyo mwalundako fikatumiwa ku iCloud Drive yenu. Fikalingana pa fibombelo fyenu fimbi kabili fikalwila pa iCloud storage yenu — ifya cine fyatumwa fyabula kushikulushiwa pa kusunga bwema (cili cingwafwilisha pa fikope nge fya numbers sha pa ng'anda).

Ku nkamafyalwe iyakosa, twasunga ukubilisha Advanced Data Protection iya iCloud (Settings → [Ishina Lyenu] → iCloud → Advanced Data Protection) pa kuti ifikope fishikulushiwe ku mpela ne mpela ne fibombelo fyenu fye e fyakwete keys.
iCloudImagesDisableConfirm_description: Ifikope ifyatumikwa kale fikafumyiwapo pa iCloud Drive. Ifya cine fya pa ici cibombelo fyaikala. Ifibombelo fyenu fimbi fikalufya ifya kwingisha pa sync iikonkapo no kupelelwa ku ma initials.
iCloudImagesRestorePrompt_title: Bweshenipo na ifikope fya bakulanshanya benu?
iCloudImagesRestorePrompt_description: Abakulanshanya benu nomba balaba — ingisheni ne fikope fyabo ukufuma ku iCloud?
iCloudRestoreDescription: Mwabombela WitnessWork pa iPhone nelyo iPad imbi? Twingaleta data yenu pa kuti mwiitamine ukutampa.
iCloudRestoreUnavailable: iCloud taili pa ici cibombelo, kanshi tukatwalilila ukwabula iCloud. Ingilani muli iCloud panuma na imwe kuti mwabwesha inshita iyo mulefwaya ukufuma muli Settings.
iCloudRestoreNoBackup: Tapali icaba kubwesha — tukamupanga ukutampa libupya mu nshita inono.
iCloudRestoreFoundSyncNote: Tukasunga iyi iPhone mu kulingana ne iCloud panuma — kuti mwacinja inshita iyo mulefwaya muli Settings.
yourPlanIntro: Mone ifyo twapangile ukufuma ku mwasuko wenu.
yourPlanReturnVisitsBlurb: Pantu mwasele ukwibukisha ukubwekeshapo ne fyalanshanya.
yourPlanTrackTimeBlurb: Pantu mwasele ukulondwa inshita yenu ya mulimo.
yourPlanCheckOffMonthHint: Tap to check off when you go out
yourPlanMapBlurb: Pantu mwasele ukusunga mapu ya bakulanshanya benu aba mu citundu.
yourPlanMapStrip: Pin sha kupangiwa amalangi pa kulingana ne nshita ya kulanshanya kwa numa nomba
yourPlanMonthlyGoalBlurb: Pantu mwasele ukupanga ifya pa mweshi.
yourPlanPlanWeekLine: Akapanga ka mulungu kalipekanyiwa pa kuingisha.
yourPlanHeroPreview: Here's what WitnessWork does for you, {{name}}.
yourPlanHeroPreviewNoName: Here's what WitnessWork does for you.
yourPlanIntroPreview: A quick tour of what's inside.
onboardingBackfillTitle: Pick up where you left off
onboardingBackfillSubtitle: Your service year started in September. Tell us your hours so far and your annual goal will start accurate from day one.
onboardingBackfillHelper: Enter regular hours and credit hours separately. We'll cap credit per month so nothing is lost across the year.
onboardingBackfillBannerSubtitle: Add your hours since September to get an accurate annual goal.
intentPickerSubtitle: Tukapanga assistant yenu pa kulingana na ici. Saleni fyonse ifyo mulefwaya! Takuli amayasuko ayabipa.
intentMonthlyGoal: Panga ifya pa mweshi / fika ku calandwilwe candi
intentMapContacts: Sunga mapu ya bakulanshanya banji aba mu citundu
homeChecklistLogFirstMinute: Lembeni iminiti yenu yantanshi iya mulimo
milestonesOrderHint: Order matters — progress fills through them in sequence. The last one is your annual goal.
resetMilestonesConfirm_description: Ici cibwesha imipindukila ya ntanshi pa lwa publisher type yenu.
lifetimeHoursInfo: Cili cili — tacisuminishe ukufunda kwa credit caps
emptyAllTime_description: Ama-awala yenu ya mubumi bonse yakalanga apa.
timeRollover_intro: Umweshi wenu wa kunuma walikwete ama-awala yapangulu. Twingapendulula amaminiti ayo muli uno mweshi pa kuti lipoti yenu yashale pa ama-awala fye yapwa.
timeRollover_autoHint: Tukapanga ici fye mu kasusu pa mweshi onse ileisa. Kuti mwacinja muli Preferences.
timeRollover_cantEdit_description: Fumyenipo pa kufumyapo bonse babili, kabili pangenipo nakabili rollover nga mulefwaya numero shimbi.
timeRollover_deletePair_description: Ici cikafumya pia entry iilingana mu mweshi umbi pa kuti math iikalile mu kulingana.
autoRollover_description:
Umweshi onse uleshila na maminiti panono ayashili apangaiapo awala yapwa — nge 34 ama-awala na 24 amaminiti. Na ici nga cabilishiwa, amaminiti ya kulundako yasendwa ku bushiku bwantanshi bwa mweshi uukonkapo pa kuti lipoti shaikalile pa ama-awala fye yapwa.

Mukamona ma entries yabili yalingana ayo yalembwa nga rollover: kamo pa bushiku bwa kupelekeshepo bwa mweshi wapwilile ukufunda amaminiti, na kamo pa bushiku bwantanshi bwa mweshi mupya ukulundakapo. Ayo yabili yacanwa lyonse — takuli inshita iyatuma nelyo iyalufiwa.

Ilyo ici cashima, mukapokelela uupokelelo umo pa kutampa kwa mweshi onse ileisa ukwipusha nga mulefwaya ukubwesha.

Ku pioneers abalonda icalandwilwe ca mwaka, rollover taipita aka kabikulu ka mwaka wa mulimo wa September — cila cilengelo ca mwaka citampa pa ama-awala fye yapwa.
contacts_searchHint: Fwayenipo amashina, ifyebo, imisangwa yenu yenu…
contacts_stalenessInfo_subtitle: Based on the most recent visit. "Not at homes" count as visits.
contacts_stalenessCriteria_recent: Last visit within the past week
contacts_stalenessCriteria_week: Last visit more than a week ago
contacts_stalenessCriteria_month: Last visit more than a month ago
contacts_emptySearch_body: Takuli abakulanshanya abalingana ne kufwaya kwenu na imisalo. Eseni ukufumya filter nelyo ukulungika ukufwaya kwenu.
helpCenter_intro_blurb: Find quick answers to common questions about WitnessWork. Can't find what you need? Reach out — your feedback shapes the app.
faq_stillNeedHelp_description: If your question isn't covered here, send a quick message. Levi reads everything personally.
faq_emailLevi: Reach out privately by email at
faq_timeRollover_q: Does my time automatically roll over to the next month?
faq_timeRollover_a: Yes. Partial hours below your monthly goal can carry over to the next month. Open Preferences → Publisher and turn on the rollover option. The carried hours appear automatically when the new month begins, so you don't need to manually subtract or re-enter anything.
faq_bibleStudies_a: Studies are tracked per contact, not per day. To count a study, open a contact, log a conversation, and mark it as "Conducted Bible Study." That contact will count as 1 study for the current month, even if you have multiple sessions with them. To raise your study count, mark a study conversation with a different contact.
faq_iCloudSync_q: Can I sync my data between my iPhone and iPad?
faq_iCloudSync_a: Yes. iCloud Sync keeps your time entries, contacts, and conversations in sync across iOS devices automatically. Enable it under Settings → iCloud Sync. iCloud Sync is a Supporter-tier feature.
faq_widgets_q: Are there home or lock screen widgets?
faq_widgets_a: Yes, on iOS. Long-press your home or lock screen, tap the + button, search for WitnessWork, and pick the widget you want. The hours widget shows your monthly progress at a glance.
faq_switchingPioneer_q: How do I switch between Publisher and Auxiliary Pioneer mid-month?
faq_switchingPioneer_a: Open Preferences → Publisher Status and choose what fits right now: Publisher, Auxiliary Pioneer, Regular Pioneer, Special Pioneer, Circuit Overseer, or Custom. Goals and totals adjust to match. Switch back when you're done. Past months keep the time you entered, so your history stays accurate.
faq_submitReport_q: Does the app submit my service report for me?
faq_submitReport_a: No. WitnessWork organizes your time and conversations. How and to whom you submit your report is up to you and your service committee. You can copy a plain-text summary, share via Hourglass, or open NW Publisher from the export sheet.
faq_remainingHours_q: How do I see how many hours I have left this month or year?
faq_remainingHours_a: Open the Progress tab from the bottom bar. The Month sub-screen shows time so far and hours left for the current month. Pioneers can switch to the Year sub-screen to see annual goal progress, time so far, remaining hours, and a per-month breakdown comparing actual hours to plan.
faq_goalPacing_q: How can I tell if I'm ahead or behind on my hour goal?
faq_goalPacing_a: Open the Progress tab from the bottom bar. The Month sub-screen shows your daily target so you can see if you're on track for the current month. Pioneers can switch to the Year sub-screen to see monthly pace toward the annual goal at a glance.
faq_timeFormat_q: Can I display time as "1h 30m" instead of "1.5"?
faq_timeFormat_a: Yes. Open Preferences → Appearance and choose your preferred time format. Both formats are available everywhere time is shown.
faq_weekStart_q: Can I start the week on Monday instead of Sunday?
faq_weekStart_a: Yes. Preferences → Appearance lets you choose the first day of the week. The change applies to the calendar, schedule, and any other weekly views.
faq_darkMode_q: Can I force dark mode or light mode?
faq_darkMode_a: Yes. Open Preferences → Appearance → Color Scheme and pick System, Light, or Dark. The app will stop following your phone's setting and use the one you choose.
faq_appIcon_q: Can I change the app's icon?
faq_appIcon_a: Yes. Open Preferences → App Icon and pick from the available alternates. Alternate icons are a Supporter-tier perk.
faq_reorderHome_q: Can I reorder the cards on my home screen?
faq_reorderHome_a: Yes. Open Preferences → Home Screen to show, hide, and reorder cards. The home screen will keep your custom layout going forward.
faq_timerRounding_q: Why was my timer rounded to the nearest 5 minutes?
faq_timerRounding_a: That was old behavior. Recent versions save the exact stopwatch time when you stop the timer, with no rounding. If you're still seeing 5-minute rounding, update the app to the latest version.
faq_addNotesToTime_q: Can I add notes to a time entry?
faq_addNotesToTime_a: Yes. When you add or edit a time entry, you can attach a note (e.g. "cart witnessing" or "cut short"). You can also tag entries with categories so similar entries stay grouped in your time reports.
faq_specialPioneerAnnual_q: I'm a special pioneer, why is the app showing me an annual goal?
faq_specialPioneerAnnual_a: Special pioneers don't have an annual goal by default. If yours appears, open Preferences → Publisher and turn off the annual goal. Your monthly goal stays in place and the annual bar on the Progress tab's Year sub-screen will be hidden.
faq_ldcCreditCap_q: Are LDC and other credit hours included in my totals?
faq_ldcCreditCap_a: Yes. Credit hours count toward your monthly hour total. For the service-year total, up to 55 credit hours per month are counted, in line with the branch's published cap. Anything above the cap is still kept on the entry but doesn't roll into the annual total.
faq_timezoneShift_q: Will my time entries or plans shift days if I travel between timezones?
faq_timezoneShift_a: No. As of the April 2026 update, every time entry and plan is anchored to its calendar date independent of timezone, so traveling or crossing a daylight-saving boundary will not move entries to a different day. Older entries created before that update are migrated automatically the first time you open the new version. If you ever spot an entry on the wrong day after updating, please send a bug report and we'll take a look.
faq_editRecurringPlan_q: Can I edit or delete a single occurrence of a recurring plan?
faq_editRecurringPlan_a: Yes. Open the Schedule tab, tap the day you want to change, and choose "Edit" or "Delete" for that occurrence. Your recurring plan stays intact for every other day.
faq_awayDay_q: How do I mark a day I'm not going out without breaking my recurring plan?
faq_awayDay_a: Tap the day on the Schedule tab and add an override for an "away" or empty day. The override only affects that one day, and the recurring plan keeps going from the next day forward.
faq_importContacts_q: Can I import contacts from my phone's address book?
faq_importContacts_a: Not at this time. Contacts are entered manually in WitnessWork. This keeps your ministry contacts private and avoids accidentally pulling in personal contacts.
faq_importOtherApps_q: Can I import data from MyTime, Ministry Assistant, or another app?
faq_importOtherApps_a: Not out of the box. Most other apps store data in proprietary or obfuscated formats, and we don't reverse-engineer them. The simplest path for everyone is to manually re-create your active contacts in WitnessWork, then back up regularly going forward. If you're an experienced developer and want to roll your own pipeline, go for it. WitnessWork backups are plain JSON with a denormalized, human-readable structure, and the source is open at github.com/leviFrosty/witness-work. See src/types (contact.ts, conversation.ts, serviceReport.ts, etc.) for the canonical types you'd need to match on both ends. Just be aware this isn't an officially supported path: we won't help debug your importer, and types can change between releases.
faq_backupRestore_q: How do I back up and restore my data?
faq_backupRestore_a: Open Preferences → Backups to export a backup file. Save it to iCloud Drive, Files, or anywhere else, then on a new device tap "Import" and pick the file. If a restore looks incomplete, please email Levi privately with the backup file attached and we'll help. Use the email link at the bottom of this screen.
faq_shareAddress_q: How do I get directions to a contact?
faq_shareAddress_a: Open the contact and tap their address. You'll be offered Apple Maps, Google Maps, or Waze depending on what's installed. You can also pin a contact's location without an address, which is useful for areas where street numbers don't exist.
faq_manualPin_q: My pin is in the wrong place. Can I move it?
faq_manualPin_a: Yes. Open the contact's address screen and drag the pin to the correct spot. You can also place a pin without an address at all, which is helpful in areas without precise geolocation data.
faq_profilePic_q: Can I add a photo to a contact?
faq_profilePic_a: Yes. Open a contact, tap the avatar, and pick a photo from your library or take a new one. This is especially handy when contacts share names or when a photo helps you spot the right door.
faq_dismissContact_q: How do I hide a contact without deleting them?
faq_dismissContact_a: Open the contact and tap "Dismiss." You'll pick how long to dismiss them for (1 week, 1 month, 3 months, 6 months, or 1 year). The contact disappears from your active lists for that period and then comes back automatically when the time is up. If notifications are enabled, you'll also get a reminder when they reappear, so dismissed contacts won't quietly slip through the cracks. You can find or restore dismissed contacts at any time under Settings → Dismissed Contacts.
faq_reportBug_q: How do I report a bug or request a feature?
faq_reportBug_a: Tap one of the buttons below to open a bug report or feature request directly. Reports that include a screenshot, your device + iOS version, and the WitnessWork version (shown at the bottom of Settings) are easiest to fix quickly.
faq_becomeSupporter_q: What do I get as a supporter?
faq_becomeSupporter_a: Monthly supporters receive the Supporter badge and a few extra personalization options — a custom accent color today, with more rolling out over time. iCloud sync for your data across devices is the next big supporter perk coming soon. One-time donations are deeply appreciated too, but don't grant ongoing Supporter status.
faq_stillFree_a: Yes — and always will be. Every core feature stays free for everyone. Supporting is completely optional; it helps fund ongoing development and unlocks a few personal touches as a thank-you.
faq_stopSupporting_q: What happens if I stop supporting?
faq_stopSupporting_a: Nothing about your data changes. If a monthly subscription lapses, any supporter-only personalization gracefully reverts to its defaults — your reports, contacts, notes, and settings are preserved exactly as they are.
faq_acceptDonations_a: As a brother in the hall, I consider it a privilege to be able to use my skills to help others in the congregation. Although free to everyone, developing, running, and maintaining this application, unfortunately costs a significant amount of money and time. I view donating as similar to how one might pay for another's gas after going in service with them - it's a loving gesture that goes greatly appreciated.
faq_donationsUsedFor_q: What are the donations used for?
faq_donationsUsedFor_a: Your donation helps keeps this app running! There are costs with purchasing real devices as development equipment, paying for location API service fees, build service API fees, app store fees, and opportunity cost of my many hours spent developing this app. Each piece of support is greatly appreciated!
faq_whatsNew_q: Where can I see what changed in the latest update?
faq_whatsNew_a: Settings → What's New shows a summary of recent changes. Major updates also pop up a one-time "What's new" sheet the first time you open the app after updating.

availability.settingsRowDescription: Tell the Assistant which days are your off days and which are Kingdom Hall meeting days. It uses both to shape its recommendations.

onboarding.title: Which days are your off days?
onboarding.body: Tap the days the Assistant should skip entirely. We won't propose service on these days. You can change this anytime in Settings.
onboarding.meetingDaysBody: Tap the days you have meetings. The Assistant will keep those days lighter so you have time to attend and prepare.

intro.title: Get a recommended plan
intro.body: Tell the Assistant your off days and meeting days, and it'll suggest the strongest plan to reach your goal.

headline.concentrated: Plan **{{hours}}** on **{{day}}** to reach your goal
headline.distributed: Plan **{{hours}}** on **{{days}} days** to reach your goal
headline.recurring: Plan **{{hours}}** every **{{weekdayList}}** for the next **{{weeks}} weeks**

rationale.small_gap_one_focused_plan: A single focused plan is the fastest path.
rationale.spread_to_sustainable_pace: Spread out so no day pushes too hard.
rationale.pattern_fits_over_horizon: A weekly rhythm makes the goal feel routine.
rationale.stretched_for_short_horizon: A bit more per day — there's not much time left.
rationale.rest_recommended_then_resume: Starts after a rest day — you've been pushing lately.
rationale.layered_on_conversation_days: Layered on days you'll already be out.
rationale.best_effort_unreachable_goal: Closing your full goal is a stretch this month — here's the strongest finish.

projectedTotal.heroSuffix: if all planned hours come through

present.empty: No hours logged or planned yet for {{period}}.
present.logged_over_goal: You're already **{{over}}** over goal. Planned hours would put you at **{{projected}}**.
present.projected_over_goal: On track — planned hours would put you at **{{projected}}**.
present.reachable_gap: Planned hours put you at **{{projected}}** — **{{gap}}** short of your goal.
present.unreachable_gap: Planned hours put you at **{{projected}}**. **{{gap}}** to goal — a stretch from here.

past.empty: No hours were logged or planned for {{period}}.

future.projected_over_goal: On track — planned hours would put you at **{{projected}}**.
future.reachable_gap: Planned hours put you at **{{projected}}** — **{{gap}}** short of goal.
future.unreachable_gap: Planned hours put you at **{{projected}}**. **{{gap}}** to goal — a stretch from here.
